beIN SPORTS XTRA 1.original_title: Deportivo Alaves vs Mallorca - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS XTRA 1.title: Deportivo Alaves vs Mallorca - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
beIN SPORTS XTRA 1.desc: Deportivo Alavés are unbeaten in their last two home LaLiga games against Mallorca  and could remain undefeated in three consecutive home matches against them for the first time in the top flight. Following their 1-0 victory at Son Moix in September 2025, RCD Mallorca are looking to complete a league double over Alavés for the third time in their history, having previously done so in the 2000/01 and 2021/22 campaigns.

beIN SPORTS XTRA 1.desc: Ligue 2 is the second division of French football. The teams play 34 games each, totaling 306 games in the season. The biggest games from each match Day are live and exclusive on beIN.
